title: Device Home Screen - No Device Connected
scenario: Home screen shows "Let's Get Started!" with Select Device and Phone Settings buttons when app is launched with no devices connected
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device (not for the first time).
Ensure no Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected to the phone.
expected: The Home screen displays: a title "Let's Get Started!", instructional text about selecting a device or using Bluetooth settings, and two buttons: "Select Device" and "Phone Settings".
